question_text: Which of the following is the correct order of electromagnetic waves from longest wavelength to shortest wavelength?

options.label: A
options.text: Radio, microwave, infrared, visible, ultraviolet, X-ray, gamma

options.label: B
options.text: Gamma, X-ray, ultraviolet, visible, infrared, microwave, radio

options.label: C
options.text: Visible, infrared, radio, microwave, ultraviolet, X-ray, gamma

options.label: D
options.text: Microwave, radio, visible, infrared, gamma, X-ray, ultraviolet

explanation: The electromagnetic spectrum is ordered by wavelength and frequency. Radio waves have the longest wavelengths and lowest frequencies, while gamma rays have the shortest wavelengths and highest frequencies. Remember: Radio, Microwave, Infrared, Visible, Ultraviolet, X-ray, Gamma.
